exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg from 70 — last session 4x5 at RPE 7, ready to progress

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Hold — set 3 dropped to 9 reps at RPE 10 last time. Get all 3 sets to 12 before adding weight.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hold — gassed out fast last time (12/9/6). If energy is the issue, do this before leg press.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.notes: Hold — RPE 10 with form breakdown last time. Prioritize clean reps; drop to 20kg if form slips.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: You ascended 50/55/60 at RPE 7 — room to push. Aim 60 across, or ascend 55/60/65.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg from 20 — 3x12 at RPE 8, ready to progress. Permanent last exercise.
